breakout_products.title: Plurai
breakout_products.content: Vibe-train evals and guardrails tailored to your use case. Vibe training for AI agent reliability. Describe what your agent should and should not do — Plurai generates training data, validates it, and deploys a custom model in minutes. It feels like vibe coding, but for evaluation and guardrails. No labeled data. No annotation pipeline. No prompt engineering. Under the hood, small language models deliver sub 100ms latency, 8x lower cost than GPT as judge, and over 43% fewer failures. Always on, not sampled. Built on published research (BARRED). Product categories: Engineering & Development, AI Metrics and Evaluation.
breakout_products.selection_reason: High-performance evaluation and guardrail tool for agents using small language models
breakout_products.summary: Plurai lets teams describe desired agent behavior and automatically generates training data, validation tests, and low-latency guardrail models for production AI systems.
breakout_products.display_title: Plurai Builds Fast Custom Guardrails and Evals for Production AI Agents
key_points: The platform turns plain-language behavior requirements into tailored evaluation datasets and guardrails.
Small language models power the system, targeting sub-100 millisecond latency and lower judging costs.
Its always-on checks aim to catch agent failures continuously instead of relying on sampled manual reviews.

breakout_products.title: Someone built a tool that runs 32 tests against any AI agent and tells you exactly where it will...
breakout_products.content: Someone built a tool that runs 32 tests against any AI agent and tells you exactly where it will lie, manipulate, hallucinate, and go rogue. One command. Five minutes. Full misalignment report. It's called iFixAi. You point it at GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, or your own custom agent. It stress-tests the behavior most teams never check before shipping. Here's what it catches: → Agents making up tool calls they were never authorized to use → Prompt injection attacks hijacking agent behavior mid-task → Agents that behave differently when they think they're being evaluated → Silent failures disguised as successful completions → Privilege escalation inside multi-user systems → Fabricated citations that sound real and aren't Here's the part nobody talks about: Most AI agent testing is vibes-based. You run it a few times. It works. You ship it. iFixAi replaces that with a repeatable, scorecarded diagnostic you can run on every deploy. Grade A through F. Category breakdown. Per-inspection outcomes. A CI drift signal that tells you if your agent is getting safer or more dangerous over time. Maps directly to EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, OWASP LLM Top 10, and ISO 42001. No API key? Run it against the mock provider. Free. No cost. Full scorecard. Every company shipping AI agents right now is flying blind. This is the instrument panel. 100% Open Source. Apache 2.0 License.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Open-source tool for automated AI agent safety and alignment testing across major models
breakout_products.summary: iFixAi is an open-source diagnostic framework that runs 32 automated stress tests against AI agents to detect vulnerabilities like prompt injections, hallucinations, and unauthorized tool usage within five minutes.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-source diagnostic tool iFixAi automates security and misalignment testing for AI agents
key_points: The tool evaluates agents against 32 specific failure modes, generating an A-F scorecard and a detailed misalignment report.
It integrates directly into CI pipelines to track behavioral drift and maps vulnerabilities to major compliance frameworks like the EU AI Act and NIST.
Released under an Apache 2.0 license, it supports major models like GPT-4o and Claude, and includes a free mock provider for testing without API keys.

llm.title: 🚀 Introducing FlashQLA: high-performance linear attention kernels built on TileLang. ⚡ 2–3× forwa...
llm.content: 🚀 Introducing FlashQLA: high-performance linear attention kernels built on TileLang. ⚡ 2–3× forward speedup. 2× backward speedup. 💻 Purpose-built for agentic AI on your personal devices. 💡Key insights: 1. Gate-driven automatic intra-card CP. 2. Hardware-friendly algebraic reformulation. 3. TileLang fused warp-specialized kernels. FlashQLA boosts SM utilization via automatic intra-device CP. The gains are especially pronounced for TP setups, small models, and long-context workloads. Instead of fusing the entire GDN flow into a single kernel, we split it into two kernels optimized for CP and backward efficiency. At large batch sizes this incurs extra memory I/O overhead vs. a fully fused approach, but it delivers better real-world performance on edge devices and long-context workloads. The backward pass was the hardest part: we built a 16-stage warp-specialized pipeline under extremely tight on-chip memory constraints, ultimately achieving 2×+ kernel-level speedups. We hope this is useful to the community!🫶🫶 Learn more: 📖 Blog: https://t.co/HF6opiR4yf 💻 Code: https://t.co/G3oaf5L1AZ
llm.selection_reason: Alibaba Qwen releases FlashQLA, high-performance linear attention kernels for edge device agents.
llm.summary: Alibaba Qwen has introduced FlashQLA, a high-performance linear attention kernel built on TileLang that significantly accelerates agentic AI workloads on personal devices.
llm.display_title: Alibaba Qwen Releases FlashQLA to Accelerate Linear Attention Kernels for Agentic AI on Edge Devices
key_points: The kernel delivers a 2 to 3 times speedup in forward passes and a 2 times speedup in backward passes.
It utilizes gate-driven automatic intra-card context parallelism to boost streaming multiprocessor utilization.
The architecture splits the flow into two kernels to optimize real-world performance for long-context workloads and small models.

llm.title: 大模型“降智”真相，找到了
llm.content: 智东西 作者 | 陈骏达 编辑 | 云鹏 智东西4月30日报道，今天，智谱发布了一篇名为《Scaling Pain：超大规模Coding Agent推理实践》的技术报告，披露了GLM-5系列模型在Coding Agent场景下遇到的推理基础设施挑战与对应解法。 报告透露，在每日数亿次Coding Agent调用压力下，部分用户遭遇了GLM-5系列模型乱码、复读和生僻字等异常，这些现象在表面上与长上下文场景下常见的“降智”相似，但智谱并未进行降低模型精度的优化，相关问题主要由高并发、长上下文的极端条件触发。 通过数周排查，智谱锁定了两个底层竞态问...
llm.selection_reason: Technical report on GLM-5 coding agent reasoning challenges and infrastructure solutions.
llm.summary: Zhipu has published a technical report detailing how high concurrency and long-context conditions triggered race conditions that caused output anomalies in its GLM-5 coding agents.
llm.display_title: Zhipu Identifies Race Conditions Causing Output Degradation in GLM-5 Coding Agent Inference
key_points: Users experienced gibberish, repetitive text, and rare characters during high-volume coding agent interactions.
The anomalies occurred under the pressure of hundreds of millions of daily API calls rather than intentional model precision reductions.
Engineers traced the degradation to two underlying race conditions triggered by extreme long-context and high-concurrency environments.

llm.title: New on the Science Blog: We gave Claude 99 problems analyzing real biological data and compared i...
llm.content: New on the Science Blog: We gave Claude 99 problems analyzing real biological data and compared its performance against an expert panel. On 23 problems, the experts were stumped. Our most recent models solved roughly 30% of those—and most of the rest. https://t.co/BYqr76zxhk
llm.selection_reason: Research showing Claude's ability to solve complex biological data problems
llm.summary: Anthropic tested Claude on 99 real-world biological data problems, finding that its newest models successfully solved approximately 30% of the challenges that completely stumped a panel of human experts.
llm.display_title: Anthropic's Latest Claude Models Outperform Human Experts in Complex Biological Data Analysis
key_points: Claude was evaluated against an expert panel on 99 biological data analysis problems.
Human experts were unable to solve 23 of the presented challenges.
The most recent Claude models solved roughly 30% of the unsolved expert-level problems alongside most of the standard ones.

image_video.title: STARFlow-V: End-to-End Video Generative Modeling with Normalizing Flows
image_video.content: Normalizing flows (NFs) are end-to-end likelihood-based generative models for continuous data, and have recently regained attention with encouraging progress on image generation. Yet in the video generation domain, where spatiotemporal complexity and computational cost are sub...
image_video.selection_reason: Apple research on end-to-end video generative modeling using normalizing flows.
image_video.summary: Apple Machine Learning researchers have developed STARFlow-V, a new approach applying normalizing flows to tackle the spatiotemporal complexity and computational costs of video generation.
image_video.display_title: Apple Introduces STARFlow-V for End-to-End Video Generative Modeling Using Normalizing Flows
key_points: The model utilizes normalizing flows as end-to-end likelihood-based generative models.
It adapts techniques recently successful in image generation to the video domain.
The architecture is specifically designed to handle high spatiotemporal complexity and computational overhead in video synthesis.

image_video.title: Deepseek 的多模态模型全量了。 目前可以在网页版的识图模式尝试，看起来是一个单独的多模态模型 https://t.co/hQd5YeBMQM
image_video.content: Deepseek 的多模态模型全量了。 目前可以在网页版的识图模式尝试，看起来是一个单独的多模态模型 https://t.co/hQd5YeBMQM
image_video.selection_reason: DeepSeek releases multimodal vision capabilities to all users on its web platform.
image_video.summary: DeepSeek has fully deployed its new multimodal model, which users can now access through the image recognition mode on its web interface.
image_video.display_title: DeepSeek Fully Rolls Out Standalone Multimodal Image Recognition Model on Web Platform
key_points: The multimodal model has reached full deployment for all users.
It is accessible via the image recognition feature on the DeepSeek web platform.
The system appears to operate as a dedicated, standalone multimodal architecture.

image_video.title: 开源版的 GPT Image 2，信息图、连续图文、本地部署全拿下｜商汤SenseNova U1实测
image_video.content: 国产开源版的「最强平替」#欢迎关注爱范儿官方微信公众号：爱范儿（微信号：ifanr），更多精彩内容第一时间为您奉上。
image_video.selection_reason: SenseNova U1 release offers a strong open-source alternative for complex multimodal tasks.
image_video.summary: SenseTime's SenseNova U1 provides an open-source, locally deployable solution capable of generating infographics and sequential visual content.
image_video.display_title: SenseNova U1 Offers an Open-Source Alternative for Infographics and Sequential Image Generation
key_points: Functions as an open-source alternative to advanced proprietary image generation models.
Supports the creation of complex infographics and continuous image sequences.
Allows for local deployment to ensure data privacy and operational control.

product_updates.title: You can now easily generate files in Gemini.
product_updates.content: Move from a brainstorm to a polished document, sheet or PDF with a single prompt in Gemini.
product_updates.selection_reason: Major update allowing Gemini to directly generate documents, sheets, and PDFs
product_updates.summary: Users can now generate polished documents, spreadsheets, and PDFs directly from a single prompt within the Gemini interface.
product_updates.display_title: Google Gemini Introduces Direct File Generation for Documents, Spreadsheets, and PDFs
key_points: Streamlines the transition from brainstorming to finalized documents.
Supports the creation of standard file formats including sheets and PDFs.
Eliminates the need for manual formatting by generating files directly from prompts.

product_updates.title: You can now ask Gemini to create Docs, Sheets, Slides, PDFs, and more directly in your chat. No m...
product_updates.content: You can now ask Gemini to create Docs, Sheets, Slides, PDFs, and more directly in your chat. No more copying, pasting, or reformatting, just prompt and download. Available globally for all @GeminiApp users. https://t.co/VuhlvehFuU
product_updates.selection_reason: Gemini can now directly generate and download various file formats in-chat
product_updates.summary: Google has globally rolled out a feature allowing Gemini users to generate and download Workspace files directly within their chat sessions.
product_updates.display_title: Global Gemini Update Enables Direct Creation and Downloading of Workspace Files in Chat
key_points: Supports direct creation of Docs, Sheets, Slides, and PDFs within the chat interface.
Removes the need for copying, pasting, or manual reformatting of AI-generated text.
The feature is now available globally to all Gemini application users.
